name: Communication
description: Articulating ideas clearly and collaborating effectively with team members and stakeholders.

name: Time Management
description: Prioritizing tasks and managing sprint deliverables efficiently.

name: Adaptability
description: Quickly learning new technologies and adjusting to shifting project requirements.

name: Teamwork
description: Fostering a positive, collaborative environment within Agile development squads.

name: Problem Solving
description: Analyzing complex technical issues and implementing robust, scalable solutions.

name: Active Listening
description: Ensuring full comprehension of user requirements and peer feedback before execution.
